title: BERIBES Bluetooth Headphones Over Ear, 65H Playtime and 6 EQ Music Modes Wireless Headphones with Microphone, HiFi Stereo Foldable Lightweight Headset, Deep Bass for Home Office Cellphone PC Ect.
description:
65 Hours Playtime: Low power consumption technology applied, BERIBES bluetooth headphones with built-in 500mAh battery can continually play more than 65 hours, standby more than 950 hours after one fully charge. By included 3.5mm audio cable, the wireless headphones over ear can be easily switched to wired mode when powers off. No power shortage problem anymore.
Optional 6 Music Modes: Adopted most advanced dual 40mm dynamic sound unit and 6 EQ modes, BERIBES updated headphones wireless bluetooth black were born for audiophiles. Simply switch the headphone between balanced sound, extra powerful bass and mid treble enhancement modes. No matter you prefer rock, Jazz, Rhythm & Blues or classic music, BERIBES has always been committed to providing our customers with good sound quality as the focal point of our engineering.
All Day Comfort: Made by premium materials, 0.38lb BERIBES over the ear headphones wireless bluetooth for work are the most lightweight headphones in the market. Adjustable headband makes it easy to fit all sizes heads without pains. Softer and more comfortable memory protein earmuffs protect your ears in long term using.
Latest Bluetooth 5.3 and Microphone: Carrying latest Bluetooth 5.3chip, after booting, 1-3 seconds to quickly pair bluetooth. Beribes bluetooth headphones with microphone has faster and more stable transmitter range up to 33ft. Two smart devices can be connected to Beribes over-ear headphones at the same time, makes you able to pick up a call from your phones when watching movie on your pad without switching.
Packaging Component: Package include a Foldable Deep Bass Headphone, 3.5MM Audio Cable, Type-c Charging Cable and User Manual.

reviews.comment: When I say so far, I mean I only got it today so I haven't been able to test the longevity of the charge or its durability over time. But for this price, what I have experienced so far is impressive.It was charged fully in 2.5 hours. Probably before that but I didn't check. They are very light and comfortable over the ears. My ears are very sensitive to any kind of prolonged pressure and some headphones like airpods are just impossible for me to wear. Even ones I do consider bearable start to hurt after a short period of time. These felt almost like nothing. Despite their comfort, even without music playing they provided a quiet experience. I had the TV on and could barely hear it with the headphones on.It was very easy to pair (it took a few seconds but did so effortlessly) and the controls are fairly intuitive. The cord may come in handy in the future, so it was a nice bonus.  I also liked the left/right labelling, as it does make a difference and it's usually indicated in the tiniest letters possible, if at all.  This made it simple and straightforward to don.I found there is a definite difference in sound using the equalizer presets, though for my taste the Pop equalizer sounded the best for pretty much all genres of music, ranging from opera to punk and a lot of stuff in between. Sound quality was far better than I anticipated from a $20 headset, certainly on par with those I have spent a lot more money on.If you are looking for inexpensive and GOOD headphones that don't hurt your head and effectively block out noise without the label and price of "noise-cancelling" this is your huckleberry.

These headphones are really light weight and comfortable, with some nice quality of life features. The left and right sides are marked clearly on the outside and in much larger R/L's on the inside of each ear. The adjustable size parts of the headband have settings they settle into with markings on them so you can set it the same amount on each side.The distance of the bluetooth connection is pretty far, I walked out of my bedroom, down a short hallway into my kitchen and it was still playing with only occasional cutting out. There was a closet and a small bathroom between me and my paired computer. There is a noticeable delay in the sound when gaming when using it with bluetooth, but that's just how that works of course.Not an audiophile or pro gamer, works great for music and minecraft. They stay on snug even when I whip my head side to side with just a little movement in place, and aren't too tight. I have pretty sensitive skin and it doesn't feel uncomfortable after wearing for a couple hours, though I do feel the pressure on my ears a bit after taking them off.The sound isolation is good too, not active noise canceling but makes everything much quieter, and with music playing at pretty mild volume it can be difficult to make out what someone right in front of you is saying. I don't know what the different sound modes really do or when I personally would want to switch to them, so I just keep it set to classic.To turn them on hold the multi function button for a 2 seconds, then to turn them off hold the button for 4 seconds. From off you enter pairing mode by holding the button for 4 seconds, and after pairing it to my pc it connects when I turn on the headphones. The instructions gave the name of the headphones to find on the list when checking discoverable bluetooth devices on my computer.This came with an aux cord and a charging cable, usb-c to usb-a. the cords aren't super long but they work for charging and connecting to my speakers if I want to listen in wired mode. I would probably want to use a longer aux cable if I wasn't just using bluetooth, so it could connect to the desktop tower itself at the back to avoid the static from my speakers.

Not bad for ~$20 headset but nothing special. The fit is a little tight so not super comfortable over long periods but perfectly fine for hour or two. I don't see the material holding in the long term but does the job with no issue and battery life has been good. The sound quality has been decent and have had no issue in connecting devices.Overall perfectly good cheap pair of headphones.
parfait pour son prix abordable, léger et confortable, bon son

I can’t say enough good things about these Bluetooth headphones—they're everything I wanted and more! From the moment I unboxed them, I was obsessed.Battery Life:First off, the battery life is unreal. I swear, I charged them once and they lasted for days (like, actual DAYS). Whether I'm working out, commuting, or just binging podcasts, they never die on me. No more constant recharging or losing audio mid-song—just hours and hours of reliable playtime.Performance:The sound quality is super crisp and clear, with just the right amount of bass. Calls are crystal-clear too, and the Bluetooth connection is rock solid—no lag, no random dropouts. They also pair in seconds, which is a huge plus.Design & Colors:Okay, let’s talk about the colors—so cute! 😍 Whether you're into soft pastels, bold brights, or sleek neutrals, there's something for every vibe. I got the lavender pair and I get compliments every single time I wear them. They're stylish and comfortable, with a snug, lightweight fit that doesn’t hurt even after hours of wear.Overall:These headphones are the perfect mix of form, function, and flair. Long battery life? Check. Great sound? Check. Aesthetic that matches your personality? Double check. I’m already thinking about getting a second pair in a different color just because I love them that much.

Equipo de buena calidad con ecualizador y pila de muy larga duración. Carga rápida de la batería, muy cómodos y con muy buena respuesta a las diferentes frecuencias. Muy prácticos para viajar. Se guardan en poco espacio. Muy buena relación Calidad : precio.
Ideal tanto para casa como para la calle. Se enlaza con facilidad, son cómodos y se pliegan. Muy cómodos y con muy buen sonido.

Was erwartet man von Kopfhörer die nicht von JBL sind? Genau. Die gleiche Leistung. Für mich sind die Kopfhörer mehr als gut. Sound klingt klar und deutlich, der Bass kommt gut und voll rüber. Sie sitzen auch gut und tun auch am Ohr nicht weh. Die Spielzeit ist mehr als zufrieden und nach einer Aufladung reicht der Akku lange aus. Geräuschunterdrückung ist in einen normalen Raum ausreichend. Laute Umgebung kann auch gefiltert werden aber nicht vollständig, was auch nicht empfehlenswert ist, wenn mal Noteinsatz ist. Wer mehr erwartet muss dann JBL Kopfhörer nehmen, die auch mehr kosten. Für meine Zwecke reichen die Kopfhörer komplett aus.
